0.content:
# 📁 Active Directory — User & OU Movement Tracking
Tracks movements of users or OUs within the directory. Uses DS Object Moved events (5139) and account name changes (4781). **Requires**: Advanced Audit Policy → DS Access → Audit Directory Service Changes enabled.

2.query:
fetch logs //, scanLimitGBytes: 500, samplingRatio: 1000
| filter matchesValue(winlog.eventid, "5139")
| filterout matchesPhrase(content, "The EventSystem sub system is suppressing duplicate event log entries for a duration of 86400 seconds")
| summarize event_count = count()

4.query:
fetch logs //, scanLimitGBytes: 500, samplingRatio: 1000
| filter matchesValue(winlog.eventid, "4781")
| filterout matchesPhrase(content, "The EventSystem sub system is suppressing duplicate event log entries for a duration of 86400 seconds")
| summarize event_count = count()

6.query:
fetch logs //, scanLimitGBytes: 500, samplingRatio: 1000
| filter matchesValue(winlog.eventid, "5139") OR matchesValue(winlog.eventid, "4781")
| filterout matchesPhrase(content, "The EventSystem sub system is suppressing duplicate event log entries for a duration of 86400 seconds")
| fieldsAdd EventType = if(winlog.eventid == "5139", "Object Moved", else: "Account Renamed")
| makeTimeseries count(), by: EventType, time:{timestamp}, interval:1h

8.query:
fetch logs //, scanLimitGBytes: 500, samplingRatio: 1000
| filter matchesValue(winlog.eventid, "5139")
| filterout matchesPhrase(content, "The EventSystem sub system is suppressing duplicate event log entries for a duration of 86400 seconds")
| parse content, """DATA 'Account Name:\t\t' DATA:PerformedBy EOL
DATA 'Account Domain:\t\t' DATA:PerformedByDomain EOL"""
| parse content, """DATA 'Old DN:		' DATA:OldDN EOL"""
| parse content, """DATA 'New DN:	' DATA:NewDN EOL"""
| fields timestamp, host.name, PerformedBy, OldDN, NewDN
| filterOut contains(PerformedBy, "$")
| sort timestamp desc

10.query:
fetch logs //, scanLimitGBytes: 500, samplingRatio: 1000
| filter matchesValue(winlog.eventid, "4781")
| filterout matchesPhrase(content, "The EventSystem sub system is suppressing duplicate event log entries for a duration of 86400 seconds")
| parse content, """DATA 'Account Name:\t\t' DATA:PerformedBy EOL
DATA 'Account Domain:\t\t' DATA:PerformedByDomain EOL
DATA 'Logon ID:\t\t' DATA:LogonID EOL
DATA 'Old Account Name:\t' DATA:OldName EOL
DATA 'New Account Name:\t' DATA:NewName EOL"""
| fields timestamp, host.name, PerformedBy, OldName, NewName
| filterOut contains(PerformedBy, "$")
| sort timestamp desc

12.query:
fetch logs //, scanLimitGBytes: 500, samplingRatio: 1000
| filter matchesValue(winlog.eventid, "5139")
| filterout matchesPhrase(content, "The EventSystem sub system is suppressing duplicate event log entries for a duration of 86400 seconds")
| fields timestamp, host.name, content
| sort timestamp desc
